title: Tanuki’s Sleepy Forest
subtitle: A quiet story to help your body slow down.

steps.text: Imagine Tanuki walking through a soft, sleepy forest.
steps.hint: The trees glow gently like night-lights.

steps.text: Tanuki finds a cozy spot under a big mossy tree.
steps.hint: The ground feels warm and safe.

steps.text: A tiny breeze moves through the leaves, making a soft shhh sound.
steps.hint: Take a slow breath in… and out… with the breeze.

steps.text: Tanuki curls up and closes their eyes, feeling calm and peaceful.
steps.hint: Let your body feel calm too.
